goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'vietnamese' food and should be in the 'west'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '19:45' on 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 16:00'.
The train should be on 'the same day as the restaurant booking' and should depart from 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve vietnamese food and should be in the west
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 19:45 on monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 16:00
The train should be on the same day as the restaurant booking and should depart from ely
Make sure you get travel time
